query.text:
declare @unit varchar(128), @status nvarchar(8), @custID nvarchar(64) select @custID = '%#15$1#20$' + rtrim(@ma_kh), @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end
exec MaxvOnline$App$Voucher$Finding 'PX5', 'c66$000000', 'm66$', 'i66$', 'ngay_ct', 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', '000000', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @custID, '', 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_so_luong,dien_giai,status', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_so_luong,dien_giai,a.status,b.statusname%l', 'a left join dmttct b on a.status = b.status where b.ma_ct = ''PX5''', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', '2', '0', @unit, 0, 1
